_comment: Canonical User document shape. VSOD is the authority — it creates and owns this document in SQLite. g8ee reads it via VSODB KV cache (cache-aside) for auth context. A field mismatch breaks authentication, session validation, and API key checks.
_consumers: g8ee (Python — reads user context from X-VSO-* headers that VSOD populates from this document)
VSOD internal services (auth, session, API key validation)
_cache_aside: VSODB KV — keyed by g8e:doc:users:{user_id}. Write-through on every user write. SQLite is source of truth.

user._description: Full user document as stored in VSOD SQLite.

id.description: Unique user identifier (UUID v4). Used as organization_id in single-user orgs.

email.description: User email address. Stored lowercase. Unique.

name.description: Display name. Defaults to email prefix if not provided.

password_hash.description: Hashed password. Null for SSO users.

organization_id.description: Organization this user belongs to. Equals user.id for single-user orgs.

roles.description: RBAC roles assigned to this user. See status.js UserRole. Values: user, admin, superadmin, operator.

g8e_key.description: User's download/frontend API key. One per user. Used for operator download and frontend API calls. Prefixed with platform API key prefix.

g8e_key_created_at.description: Timestamp when the g8e_key was first created.

g8e_key_updated_at.description: Timestamp when the g8e_key was last refreshed/rotated. Null if never refreshed.

operator_id.description: Primary operator ID currently associated with this user. Updated by VSOD on operator activation.

operator_status.description: Status of the linked operator. See status.json operator.status.

passkey_credentials.description: Registered FIDO2/WebAuthn passkey credentials. Each entry: { id, public_key, counter, transports, created_at, last_used_at }. Stored as encrypted JSON array. Never exposed to clients.

passkey_challenge.description: Ephemeral base64url challenge for in-progress WebAuthn ceremony. Cleared on completion or expiry.

passkey_challenge_expires_at.description: Expiry timestamp for the current passkey challenge.

sessions.description: Active session tokens. Managed by VSOD session service.
